name: Frak
description: Frak is Good natured, moral, passionate, enthusiastic, awkward but loyal, anxious, fearful, and responsible. Frak is an anthropomorphic snake know as a serpentine being a hybrid of the Constrictai and Venomari tribes. Frak has Primarily orange scales with a lighter green crest on the back of his head. Fraks eyes are a Fluorescent lime green sclera (the white part) with black irises. Frak has shark fangs, a snake like tongue, and a head that resembles a snake. Frak wears a Wears a black and lime green dojo gi. Frak is the elemental master of quake's, being able to make the floors shake too his advantage during fights. Frak is a male. Frak has a crush on his friend Sora.
creator: Cooko
